entries.title: Agent Mode gains Next Edit Suggestions
entries.description: Agent Mode now predicts your next edit location and pre-populates suggestions based on your recent changes.

entries.title: Custom Agents (.agent.md) reach GA
entries.description: Define reusable specialized agents with .agent.md files in .github/agents/. Agents can use tools, MCP servers, and custom instructions.

entries.title: Coding Agent (Copilot Workspace) clears for departure
entries.description: Cloud-based autonomous coding agent reaches GA. Assigns GitHub Issues to Copilot for end-to-end implementation in a sandboxed environment.

entries.title: Copilot Extensions grounded — replaced by MCP
entries.description: Copilot Extensions are deprecated in favor of the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Existing extensions should migrate to MCP servers.

entries.title: gh copilot CLI grounded — standalone 'copilot' takes over
entries.description: The 'gh copilot' CLI extension is deprecated. A standalone 'copilot' command replaces it with enhanced capabilities.

entries.title: Agent Mode clears for departure
entries.description: Agent Mode reaches General Availability across VS Code, JetBrains, Visual Studio, Eclipse, and Xcode. Autonomous multi-file editing with terminal access.

entries.title: Data Residency reaches GA
entries.description: Enterprise customers can now choose data processing regions (EU, US) for Copilot prompts and suggestions.

entries.title: Model Context Protocol support reaches GA
entries.description: MCP servers can now be configured in VS Code settings or .vscode/mcp.json to extend Copilot with custom tools and data sources.

entries.title: Multi-model support expanded
entries.description: Copilot Chat now supports Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Gemini 2.0 Flash, and GPT-4o alongside the default model. Model selection available in chat dropdown.

entries.title: Agent Mode cleared for takeoff
entries.description: Agent Mode enters public preview in VS Code. Autonomous coding loop with terminal access, multi-file editing, and self-correction.

entries.title: Copilot Code Review reaches GA
entries.description: AI-powered code review on GitHub.com pull requests reaches General Availability. Provides inline suggestions and security feedback.

entries.title: MCP support cleared for takeoff
entries.description: VS Code gains experimental support for Model Context Protocol servers, allowing Copilot to connect to external tools and data sources.

entries.title: NOTAM: Copilot Free tier announced
entries.description: GitHub announces a free tier of Copilot with 2,000 code completions and 50 chat messages per month. Available to all GitHub users.

entries.title: @workspace reaches GA
entries.description: The @workspace chat participant reaches General Availability, enabling codebase-wide context in Copilot Chat queries.

entries.title: Copilot Code Review cleared for takeoff
entries.description: AI-powered pull request review enters public preview on GitHub.com. Copilot can be requested as a reviewer on PRs.

entries.title: Data Residency enters preview
entries.description: Enterprise customers can now opt into data processing region selection for Copilot in preview.

entries.title: Copilot Extensions cleared for takeoff
entries.description: Third-party extensions for Copilot Chat enter preview. Developers can build integrations that add context and capabilities.

entries.title: @workspace enters preview
entries.description: New @workspace chat participant enables codebase-wide questions in Copilot Chat, searching across all files in the workspace.

entries.title: Copilot Enterprise clears for departure
entries.description: Copilot Enterprise tier launches with knowledge bases, fine-tuned models, and advanced admin controls.

entries.title: /explain reaches GA
entries.description: The /explain slash command for code explanation reaches General Availability across all supported IDEs.

entries.title: Usage Metrics dashboard reaches GA
entries.description: Organization admins can now view Copilot adoption metrics including acceptance rates, active users, and language breakdown.

entries.title: Copilot Chat clears for departure
entries.description: Copilot Chat reaches General Availability in VS Code and JetBrains. Conversational AI coding assistant available to all subscribers.

entries.title: Seat Management reaches GA
entries.description: Organization admins can assign, remove, and manage Copilot seats across teams with granular policies.

entries.title: GitHub Copilot clears for departure
entries.description: GitHub Copilot reaches General Availability with inline code completions. The first AI pair programmer available to individual developers.
